description: Natural-language SQL assistant for UNHCR end-year population stocks. Covers refugees, asylum-seekers, IDPs, stateless populations, and Others-of-Concern (OOC) by country-of-origin × country-of-asylum from 1951 to 2024. Includes age-sex demographic breakdowns and the IDMC internal-displacement series. Built on Spark Delta tables in workspace.hackathon. Source: UNHCR Refugee Data Finder API, CC BY 4.0. Does NOT cover asylum applications, decisions, or durable solutions — see the UNHCR Asylum & Solutions space for those.
sample_questions: How many refugees from Sudan are there at end-2024?
What are the top 5 host countries for Sudanese refugees in 2024?
Show me the trend of forcibly displaced people from Syria over the last 10 years.
Compare Sudan and Syria's total displaced populations in 2024.
What is the age and sex breakdown of refugees from Ukraine in Poland for 2024?
Which countries have the highest internally displaced populations as of the latest year?
What share of the world's refugees does Lebanon host in 2024?
Show me the Venezuelan displaced-abroad population year by year since 2015.
Top 10 origins of refugees worldwide in 2024.
How many stateless people are recorded in Bangladesh in 2024?
